rag_rules: Fuse AGREE text only into an owning AADL element whose scope legally exposes every referenced symbol.
Preserve architecture: add or update annex content without changing components, subcomponents, connections, or properties.
Use the analyzed AADL structure as the authority for owner kind, names, and visible interface symbols.
generic_rules: Interface-level contracts belong on component types; implementation-only bindings belong on component implementations.
When merging into an existing owner, keep prior non-annex content intact and avoid duplicating equivalent annex wrappers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE content is enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Implementation-scope AGREE text should appear only after the implementation elements it depends on are declared.
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE text where it references subcomponent ports or other symbols not visible in that owner's scope.
Do not infer scope from requirement wording alone; confirm ownership from the AADL model structure.
irrelevant_topics: Numeric range checks over Boolean or opaque data
Using AADL property names or unit tokens as AGREE variables
